mitigations.mitigation_name: Configure FortiGate DoS/Anomaly protections to detect and throttle ICMP floods: enable ICMP-specific rate limiting, per-source packet/connection thresholds, and automated dropping of high-rate ICMP flows while logging and alerting.

args.command:
config firewall address
    edit "LAN_NET"
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
    edit "TARGET_7.0.14.254"
        set subnet 7.0.14.254 255.255.255.255
    next
end

config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "Deny_ICMP_LAN_to_WAN"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_NET"
        set dstaddr "TARGET_7.0.14.254"
        set action deny
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

config firewall address
    edit "TARGET_7.0.14.254"
        set subnet 7.0.14.254 255.255.255.255
    next
end

config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "Deny_All_ICMP_LAN_to_WAN"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_NET"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set action deny
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

show firewall address
show firewall policy

config firewall DoS-policy
    edit 3
        set name "ICMP_RATE_LIMIT"
        set interface "port2"
        set srcaddr "LAN_NET"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set service "PING"
        set anomaly icmp
        set threshold 50
        set period 1
        set action block
        set log enable
    next
end

show firewall DoS-policy

config firewall DoS-policy
    edit 3
        set status enable
        set block-period 60
        set log enable
    next
end

show firewall DoS-policy
